channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pochettino wins US debut as Musah and Pepi score second-half goals in 2-0 victory over Panama
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Mauricio Pochettino arrived at Q2 Stadium to see posters and banners with his face around the grandstand and behind a goal. By the time he left, he was saluting fans who were cheering his name. The 52-year-old Argentine's debut as U.S. coach was a crowd-pleasing success.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vanecek shines but San Jose Sharks’ October woes continue
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks play first game since Macklin Celebrini was placed on injured reserve (lower body)
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Dillon Gabriel rallies No. 3 Oregon past No. 2 Ohio State, 32-31
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — Dillon Gabriel threw two touchdown passes and ran for another late score to help third-ranked Oregon hand No. 2 Ohio State its first loss of the season, 32-31 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Penn State rallies back to beat USC 33-30 in overtime on TE Tyler Warren's record day
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Penn State traveled about 2,500 miles across the continent on its first road trip in the new Big Ten. The Nittany Lions then spent most of Saturday playing from behind against Southern California.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ejection of Oregon's Traeshon Holden is third this season in FBS for a player spitting on opponent
item.description: Oregon receiver Traeshon Holden was ejected from the third-ranked Ducks' game against Ohio State for unsportsmanlike conduct after he spit on a Buckeyes player.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: UNC player Tylee Craft dies at 23 of lung cancer; teammate scores touchdown wearing his jersey
item.description: UNC wide receiver Tylee Craft died Saturday at the age of 23. Before learning of his death, the team held a ceremony for him, and J.J. Jones scored a touchdown wearing Craft's jersey.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senga's comeback to continue with start for Mets in Game 1 of NLCS vs Dodgers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Mets pitcher Kodai Senga will start Game 1 of the National League Championship Series against Jack Flaherty and the Los Angeles Dodgers on Sunday, continuing his comeback from injuries that have limited him to two starts this year.
item.dc:creator: JERRY BEACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Daniels returns at QB, but Stanford can’t keep up with No. 11 Notre Dame
item.description: The Cardinal scored on its opening drive, keyed by a 27-yard run from Ashton Daniels, but never came close to scoring after that.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 4 Penn State fights back from two-touchdown deficit for walk-off win against unranked USC in overtime
item.description: No. 4 Penn State trailed by as many as two touchdowns against unranked USC, but the Nittany Lions earned a walk-off overtime win Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: German soccer player punished for not signing gay pride shirt: 'I'm not signing that'
item.description: German professional soccer club VfL Wolfsburg disciplined striker Kevin Behrens after he didn't sign a gay pride shirt and allegedly said something offensive.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts admits using Manny Machado drama as a 'diversion' for his team
item.description: A day after the Dodgers' 10-2 loss to the Padres, Dave Roberts called out Manny Machado for throwing a ball at him "with something behind it." It was all part of a plan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets QB Aaron Rodgers is off the injury report and fine to play Monday night vs. Bills
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers is off the New York Jets' injury report and will be back under center Monday night against the Buffalo Bills. The quarterback was a full participant Saturday after being limited Thursday and Friday while dealing with a sprained ankle.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sydney Sweeney responds to Oregon mascot's flirty ‘College GameDay’ sign
item.description: Hollywood actress Sydney Sweeney has responded to the Oregon Ducks mascot's flirtation ahead of the team's big matchup against Ohio State Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets holdout sued for $1.6 million; allegedly failed to pay business partner, sent 'security' to scare him off
item.description: As he continues his bizarre holdout that has cost him nearly $9 million, Haason Reddick is being sued for $1.6 million after allegedly stiffing, and trying to scare off, a business partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Holding a Super Bowl outside the US is a possibility, NFL Commissioner Goodell says
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The NFL's aggressive international growth plan could include holding a Super Bowl outside the United States for the first time, Commissioner Roger Goodell said Saturday. Goodell has shot down the idea in the past, but he told a fan forum in London that it's a possibility.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Jose Sharks place Celebrini on injured reserve
item.description: Macklin Celebrini will miss an unspecified amount of San Jose Sharks games, including tonight's game against the Anaheim Ducks
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Scores: Week 8 of the 2024 high school football season
item.description: Every week, high school athletes across the region prove that big time players make big time plays in big time games. (Like the Los Angeles Dodgers did in the deciding Game 5 of the NLDS against the San Diego Padres on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, Fox 5

item.title: Gerrit Cole tosses playoff gem, shutting down Royals and sending Yankees back to ALCS with 3-1 win
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Gerrit Cole pitched like a postseason ace Thursday night, holding the Kansas City Royals to a single run over seven innings and sending the New York Yankees to a 3-1 victory that put them back in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Lucha Libre on the rise on the West Coast
item.description: It's not an uncommon sight here in the Bay Area: Hispanic heritage on display -- the outfits, the dancing.
item.dc:creator: Jack Molmud, NewsNation

item.title: Tennis legend Rafael Nadal, 22-time Grand Slam champ, announces retirement
item.description: Rafael Nadal, professional tennis legend and 22-time Grand Slam champion announced his retirement in a video message early Thursday morning.
item.dc:creator: Joshua Hallenbeck, KTLA 5

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Whittingham not ready to hand keys over to Wilson yet
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With so much uncertainty as to when Cam Rising will be able to return at quarterback for the Utah football team, is there a point when head coach Kyle Whittingham will move on from Rising and hand the keys to the offense over to freshman Isaac Wilson? "There is
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Hockey Club celebrates opening game with evening-long Delta Center plaza party
item.description: Just 172 days after it was announced Utah would be joining the National Hockey League, the Utah Hockey Club is set to play its first game in its inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Another state regulator targets Brewers owner over alleged sand theft in Malibu
item.description: A second state agency is targeting the owner of the Milwaukee Brewers for taking sand from a Malibu beach.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Tossed balls from stands, apparently aimed at Profar, interrupt Padres' win in NLDS Game 2
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Tempers flared on the field and in the stands at Dodger Stadium, with rowdy fans tossing baseballs, apparently at San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar, and then trash that caused a 12-minute wait between pitches during the seventh inning of the Padres' 10-2 win in NL Division S
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodger Stadium fans toss balls and trash on field, interrupt Padres' 10-2 win that evens NLDS
item.description: Fans threw baseballs in the direction of San Diego left fielder Jurickson Profar and then tossed trash that caused a lengthy delay before the Padres beat the Los Angeles Dodgers 10-2 on Sunday night to even their NL Division Series at a game apiece.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stenhouse snaps 65-race losing streak after late crash at Talladega scrambles playoff picture
item.description: Ricky Stenhouse Jr. snapped a 65-race losing streak by winning in overtime at Talladega on Sunday after a late crash collected more than half the field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5
